nodes.docs:
Creates a validated challenge from a method intent.

If `secretKey` option is provided, the challenge ID is computed as HMAC-SHA256
over the challenge parameters, cryptographically binding the ID to its contents.
tags: intent - The method intent to validate against.
parameters - Challenge parameters (realm, request, optional expires/digest, and id if no secretKey).
options - Optional settings including secretKey for HMAC-bound ID.

nodes.docs: Tempo charge intent for one-time TIP-20 token transfers.
Secret key for HMAC-bound challenge ID.
